---
name: Bug report
about: Report a fallow-py crash, incorrect output, or CLI problem
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Version

Run `fallow-py --version`. If you used the legacy `pyfallow` alias, include the deprecation stderr too.

## Python Version

Example: `3.11.9`

## OS

Example: macOS, Linux, Windows

## Command Run

```bash

```

## Expected Behavior

What did you expect?

## Actual Behavior

What happened?

## Minimal Reproduction

Provide the smallest project or code snippet that reproduces the issue.

## Report Excerpt

Paste a short JSON/text excerpt. Avoid secrets and private paths.

## Confidence Or Severity Concern

If the finding exists but severity/confidence feels wrong, explain why.
